subject: english_language
source_body: WAEC Nigeria / NECO / State Ministries of Education

questions.body: Identify the part of speech of the underlined word: "She runs very QUICKLY."
questions.explanation: "Quickly" modifies the verb "runs" — it tells us HOW she runs → adverb.

questions.body: Change to indirect speech: She said, "I am going to school."
options: She said that she is going to school.
She said that she was going to school.
She says that she was going to school.
She said that I am going to school.
questions.answer: She said that she was going to school.
questions.explanation: In indirect speech with past reporting verb ("said"), present tense "am" changes to past "was".
